title: Mark Lifman murder: Bail denied
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - Bail has been denied...
bodyText:
Breaking News
                            Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - Bail has been denied for Johannes Jacobs and Gert Bezuidenhout in the George Magistrate’s Court this afternoon, Friday 17 January.


> In his judgement Magistrate André Aucamp said their release on bail will not be in the interest of justice, nor could he find any exceptional circumstances to justify bail.


The case has been postponed until 20 February for further investigation as the state is still waiting for cell phone analyses and ballistic reports.

VIDEO: Mark Lifman murder: Bail denied

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
